creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
On 2 June 2011 23:08, Florent Thoumie <florent.thoumie@gmail.com> wrote:
> Not a good idea because the user/group could be required by another port.
>
> Package tools should/will deal with that.
>

I did agree with you at first, but the consensus was that there was
very little difference between that and the fact that users are warned
about anyway.

If you look at where I've applied the patch, I've more or less
copy/pasted the USERS code and adapted it.

Does that explain my motives?

Chris
